cv.headline: Senior Ruby on Rails Engineer
cv.summary: Full Stack Developer with 6+ years building and shipping production Ruby on Rails applications across payments, travel booking, and cybersecurity platforms. Experienced in PCI-DSS compliant payment systems, GraphQL and RESTful API design, and PostgreSQL optimisation, with a track record of mentoring engineers and leading sprints within ISO 27001 certified environments.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer Intern
bullets: Delivered review, rating, and recipe management features for a React Native and Django application as part of the Master of Software Engineering industry placement at Yoobee Colleges, maintaining production stability throughout.
Contributed across the full agile cycle — sprint planning, PR review, and releases — debugging cross-platform issues in development and production environments.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Sole developer on the Work Skills RTO platform, modernising a legacy Ruby on Rails system and delivering new features across the product.
Optimised the portfolios endpoint by rewriting an inefficient SQL query and eliminating N+1 queries, reducing load time from ~2 minutes to ~30 seconds (approximately 75% faster).
Designed and built an AVETMISS NAT reporting engine producing distinct formats for Queensland, New South Wales, and NCVER national submissions.
Built a certificate generation and public verification portal to confirm document authenticity and reduce credential fraud risk.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Advanced from intern to Senior Software Engineer in 3.5 years; led sprint planning, code reviews, and mentoring of junior engineers within an ISO 27001 certified environment.
Helped integrate a PCI-DSS compliant Credit Card Vault into the WellTravel booking platform, enabling secure card processing across a multi-region travel system.
Integrated Stripe with 3D Secure, Paygate, and PayFast for live financial transactions across multiple regional markets.
Architected a monorepo with a Rails backend and React frontend communicating over GraphQL, streamlining deployment and developer workflow.
Built Elasticsearch-backed filtering and sorting for the WellTravel booking engine.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering

awards.title: Best Paper Award
awards.event: 9th IEEE Control and System Graduate Research Colloquium

paragraphs: I am writing to apply for the Senior Ruby on Rails Engineer role at Acme Payments Ltd. With 6+ years building production Rails applications — including PCI-DSS compliant payment systems handling live transactions across multiple markets — I am confident I can contribute meaningfully to your payments platform from day one.

At WellDev I helped integrate a Credit Card Vault into a multi-region travel booking platform and connected Stripe with 3D Secure, Paygate, and PayFast for live financial processing. I designed GraphQL and RESTful APIs, built Elasticsearch-backed search for the booking engine, and advanced to Senior Engineer and technical lead, running code reviews and mentoring junior engineers within an ISO 27001 certified environment. At Webbernet I was the sole developer on a legacy Rails modernisation, where I also reduced a critical endpoint's load time by approximately 75% through SQL and N+1 query optimisation — the kind of work directly relevant to a high-throughput payments platform.

I am based in Auckland, hold a Post Study Work Visa valid until May 2029, and am available for hybrid work. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background in Rails, payments, and team leadership aligns with what you are building.
